title: A protocol to assess ToxRTool use in peer-reviewed literature
author: Camargo, Krisa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This protocol outlines proposed steps to assess the current use of ToxRTool.  The project's purpose is to map available trends and share recommendations on correct use of ToxRTool.
steps_raw: This protocol outlines proposed steps to assess the current use of ToxRTool.  The project's purpose is to map available trends and share recommendations on correct use of ToxRTool.
